name: Blueberry Lemon Loaf
description: Dense, moist loaf with fresh blueberries and bright lemon zest — olive oil keeps it tender.

items: 2 tbsp lemon juice + 1 tbsp lemon zest (candied lemon)
1 tsp baking powder  (or: ¼ tsp baking soda + ½ tsp lemon juice + ¼ tsp flour)

steps: Preheat oven to 350°F (try 375°F). Grease medium pan (28 in²).
In a bowl, whisk together oil, eggs, sugar, lemon juice, lemon zest, and milk.
Add flour and baking powder and mix until evenly combined.
Gradually fold dry into wet until no flour chunks remain.
Gently fold in the flour-coated blueberries.
Pour into pan and bake 40–45 min (use a chopstick to check — if batter sticks, keep going).
notes: Try reducing sugar slightly next time.
